title: 3rd visualization dimension in a Gantt view
excerpt:
on top of the “group by” and “color by”, to add 3rd visualization dimension- “shape by”. 
every item except of having specific color, will have a shape (star/ circle/ triangle etc)according to chosen column’s values.

posts.author: Olga.S (Olga Shulkin)
posts.cookedHtml:
on top of the “group by” and “color by”, to add 3rd visualization dimension- “shape by”.
every item except of having specific color, will have a shape (star/ circle/ triangle etc)according to chosen column’s values.
